scripts.rc:smoke: pnpm --filter @bones/compiler build && pnpm --filter @bones/ldtk-adapter build && pnpm --filter @bones/platformer-preview build && pnpm --filter @bones/runtime-pixi build && node scripts/rc-smoke.mjs && pnpm exec tsc -p examples/pixi-platformer/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.export:sample: pnpm --filter @bones/compiler build && pnpm --filter @bones/runtime-pixi build && node scripts/export-sample.mjs
scripts.perf:runtime: pnpm --filter @bones/compiler build && pnpm --filter @bones/runtime-pixi build && node scripts/runtime-bench.mjs
